project_profile.project_name: 535591-EvoRobo：下一_智能机器人-项目策划书-fe2e79cb
pain_points: 第十九届“挑战杯”全国大学生课外学术科技作品竞赛“人工智能+”应用赛

摘要 近年来，随着人工智能技术的快速发展，机器人在学习人类技能、代替人类完成特定任务的能力得到充分展现。但是，通过机器学习技术获得的技能在实际应用场景中数据类型杂、新知获得难、部署差异大的“数据-技能-任务”多维约束挑战，导致了机器人对于多源数据集无法充分利用、对于分布外任务难以尝试执行、对于实际部署差异难以调整策略，上述问题极大程度地限制了机器人在实际场景中 的应用范围。   本项目以上述问题为牵引，设计了一套面向具身智能机器人的“学习-启发-熟知”技能发育框架，面向多源数据的归一化表征与模型训练方法能够有效实现跨智能体数据模型训练；基于通用大模型的新知获得方法利用大语言模型的广泛通识赋能机器人新知探索能力；场景重建实现虚实混合新技能学习通过人在回路评判将新知有效转换为高鲁棒性技能实现策略。 项目的创新点包括： 第一， 针对开源数据集数据类型复杂的痛点问题，本项目对多源具身操作数据集使用图建模方法提取视频的交互特征，通过预训练模态引导新引入模态的训练，并通过指令微调将具身知识注入模型，提出面向具身操作的多模态模型训练方法，解决多源数据难以统一训练的问题，初步构建通用具身技能库； 第二，针对分布外技能难以自主尝试的痛点问题，本项目提出具身感知认知映射、演示观测-动作与认知对齐、技能场景迁移与持续更新等关键技术，利用通用大模型的通识知识，提升多场景下智能体的场景理解、技能学习、持续学习的能力，提升具身智能体在新任务多场景条件下的泛化性； 第三，针对训练与部署阶段场景与技能差异大的痛点问题，本项目提出开放环境下的虚实混合技能获取方法，通过零样本实例认知、物体承载属性判别与层次划分、复杂环境交互关系建模等手段将实际场景虚拟化，采用迭代比较策略更新技能实现场景迁移，并通过人在回路强化学习将具身技能与人类需求对齐，实现新场景具身技能的高鲁棒性； 依托本工作，项目组成员发表论文9篇，其中包括顶级会议CVPR 1篇，NeurIPS 2篇，顶级期刊论文IJRR 1篇（中国大陆每年仅5篇）并获得10项发明专利。在学术界首次提出用5条视频进行高精度任务学习框架、首次提出场景图作为机器人训练范式、首次提出将通用VLM应用机械臂泛化学习范式。在校内外，部署本项目算法的机械臂在某高校作为食堂服务机器人，实现7天零故障运行，获得新华社、光明日报等媒体报道；在海淀科技庙会作为展品为观众发放糖果，获市、区领导一致好评。在工业界，项目成果有效应用于国地共创人形机器人中心、华为2012实验室、京东探索研究院等公司和机构，获得了良好的经济效益和社会评价。 关键词：具身智能；智能机器人；持续学习

Abstract In recent years, with the rapid development of artificial intelligence technology, the ability of robots to learn human skills and complete specific tasks instead of human has been fully demonstrated. However, the multi-dimensional constraint challenges of "data skills tasks" such as miscellaneous data types, difficulty in obtaining new knowledge, and large deployment differences of skills acquired through machine learning technology in actual application scenarios lead to the robots' inability to make full use of multi-source data sets, difficulty in trying to execute tasks outside the distribution, and difficulty in adjusting strategies for actual deployment differences. The above problems greatly limit the application scope of robots in actual scenarios. Based on the above problems, this project designs a set of "learning elicitation familiarity" skill development framework for embodied intelligent robots. The normalized representation and model training method for multi-source data can effectively realize cross agent data model training; The new knowledge acquisition method based on the general large model uses the extensive general knowledge of the large language model to enable the robot to explore new knowledge; Scene reconstruction to realize virtual and real mixed new skill learning effectively transforms new knowledge into high robust skill realization strategy through human in the loop evaluation. The innovations of the project include: First, aiming at the pain points of the complex data types of open source data sets, this project uses graph modeling method to extract the interactive features of video for multi-source embodied operation data sets, guides the training of newly introduced modes through pre training modes, and injects embodied knowledge into the model through command fine-tuning, proposes a multimodal model training method for embodied operation, solves the problem that it is difficult to unify the training of multi-source data, and initially constructs a general embodied skill library; Second, in view of the pain points that it is difficult to try out the skills outside the distribution, this project proposes some key technologies, such as embodied perception cognitive mapping, demonstration observation action and cognitive alignment, skill scene migration and continuous updating, and uses the general knowledge of the general model to improve the ability of agents' scene understanding, skill learning and continuous learning in multiple scenes, and to improve the generalization of embodied agents in new tasks and multiple scenes; Third, in view of the pain points of large differences in scenarios and skills in the training and deployment phase, this project proposes a method to acquire virtual and real mixed skills in an open environment. The actual scene is virtualized by means of zero sample instance cognition and cross frame consistency fusion, object bearing attribute discrimination and hierarchical division, complex environment interaction modeling and 3D scene graph representation method, and the skills are updated by iterative comparison strategy to realize scene migration, and the embodied skills are aligned with human needs through human in the loop reinforcement learning, so as to realize the high robustness of embodied skills in new scenes;

Based on this work, the members of the project team published  9  articles, including 1 CVPR, 2 NeurIPS, 1 IJRR(only 5 in mainland China each year), and obtained 10 invention patents. Inside and outside the school, the robot arm that deployed the algorithm of the project was used as a canteen service robot to achieve 7-day zero fault operation, which was reported by Xinhua news agency, Guangming Daily and other media; Candy was distributed to the audience as an exhibit at the Haidian Science and technology temple fair, which was highly praised by municipal and district leaders. In the industrial sector, the project achievements have been effectively applied to companies and institutions such as the national and local co creation humanoid robot center, Huawei 2012 laboratory and JD Exploration Research Institute, and have achieved good economic benefits and social evaluation.  Keywords: embodied intelligence; intelligent robot; continuous learning

Abstract In recent years, with the rapid development of artificial intelligence technology, the ability of robots to learn human skills and complete specific tasks instead of human has been fully demonstrated. However, the multi-dimensional constraint challenges of "data skills tasks" such as miscellaneous data types, difficulty in obtaining new knowledge, and large deployment differences of skills acquired through machine learning technology in actual application scenarios lead to the robots' inability to make full use of multi-source data sets, difficulty in trying to execute tasks outside the distribution, and difficulty in adjusting strategies for actual deployment differences. The above problems greatly limit the application scope of robots in actual scenarios. Based on the above problems, this project designs a set of "learning elicitation familiarity" skill development framework for embodied intelligent robots. The normalized representation and model training method for multi-source data can effectively realize cross agent data model training; The new knowledge acquisition method based on the general large model uses the extensive general knowledge of the large language model to enable the robot to explore new knowledge; Scene reconstruction to realize virtual and real mixed new skill learning effectively transforms new knowledge into high robust skill realization strategy through human in the loop evaluation. The innovations of the project include: First, aiming at the pain points of the complex data types of open source data sets, this project uses graph modeling method to extract the interactive features of video for multi-source embodied operation data sets, guides the training of newly introduced modes through pre training modes, and injects embodied knowledge into the model through command fine-tuning, proposes a multimodal model training method for embodied operation, solves the problem that it is difficult to unify the training of multi-source data, and initially constructs a general embodied skill library; Second, in view of the pain points that it is difficult to try out the skills outside the distribution, this project proposes some key technologies, such as embodied perception cognitive mapping, demonstration observation action and cognitive alignment, skill scene migration and continuous updating, and uses the general knowledge of the general model to improve the ability of agents' scene understanding, skill learning and continuous learning in multiple scenes, and to improve the generalization of embodied agents in new tasks and multiple scenes; Third, in view of the pain points of large differences in scenarios and skills in the training and deployment phase, this project proposes a method to acquire virtual and real mixed skills in an open environment. The actual scene is virtualized by means of zero sample instance cognition and cross frame consistency fusion, object bearing attribute discrimination and hierarchical division, complex environment interaction modeling and 3D scene graph representation method, and the skills are updated by iterative comparison strategy to realize scene migration, and the embodied skills are aligned with human needs through human in the loop reinforcement learning, so as to realize the high robustness of embodied skills in new scenes;

Based on this work, the members of the project team published  9  articles, including 1 CVPR, 2 NeurIPS, 1 IJRR(only 5 in mainland China each year), and obtained 10 invention patents. Inside and outside the school, the robot arm that deployed the algorithm of the project was used as a canteen service robot to achieve 7-day zero fault operation, which was reported by Xinhua news agency, Guangming Daily and other media; Candy was distributed to the audience as an exhibit at the Haidian Science and technology temple fair, which was highly praised by municipal and district leaders. In the industrial sector, the project achievements have been effectively applied to companies and institutions such as the national and local co creation humanoid robot center, Huawei 2012 laboratory and JD Exploration Research Institute, and have achieved good economic benefits and social evaluation.  Keywords: embodied intelligence; intelligent robot; continuous learning
